title: Mace-3d
description: A simple texture pack that turns old 2d Mace into 3d
body:
### A simple texture pack that turns old 2d Mace into 3d![Example Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0d59aaff58b63ea53aae41e374824dced703d14.png)
3D Mace – Simple 3D Upgrade
This texture pack replaces Minecraft’s old flat 2D Mace with a fully 3D model, bringing extra depth and realism to your game. Designed to stay true to the vanilla style while enhancing visual quality.

**Features:**

**♦ High-quality 3D Mace model**

**♦ Vanilla-friendly design**

**♦ Lightweight and performance-friendly**


Perfect for players who love small but satisfying visual improvements!
